name: CCK-8 Cell Proliferation / Viability Assay
nameCn: CCK-8 细胞增殖/活力检测

components.name: 1. 96 孔板铺板 (2,000–10,000 cells/well)
components.note: 100 µL 完全培养基; 边缘孔加 PBS 防蒸发

components.name: 3. 加药物/处理因素
components.note: 每个浓度 3–6 复孔; 含空白孔 (培养基+CCK-8)

components.name: 5. 每孔加 10 µL CCK-8 试剂
components.note: 避光操作, 勿产生气泡

components.name: 6. 37°C 孵育 1–4 h
components.note: 颜色从橙红变为深橙; 1 h 后每 30 min 检查

components.name: 7. 450 nm 读板 (参考波长 650 nm)
8. 计算活力 = (OD处理 - OD空白) / (OD对照 - OD空白) × 100%

notes.en: CCK-8 is more sensitive and less toxic than MTT. No need to solubilize crystals. Can re-measure the same plate at different time points. OD450 proportional to viable cells. Avoid bubbles when adding reagent.
notes.zh: CCK-8 优于 MTT：水溶性无需溶解结晶、可连续检测（非终点法）、灵敏度更高。含酚红培养基会稍有背景但不影响结果。细胞数与 OD 值需在线性范围内——首次使用做标准曲线。还原性物质（DTT, β-ME）和高血清浓度可能产生假阳性。WST-1 是类似替代品。

ref: Ishiyama et al. (1997) Talanta 44:1299; Dojindo CCK-8 Technical Manual
